message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Requesting Scott's final re-review for 9/9 Step 7 consensus">
Scott, we have 8/9 approvals for Step 7 (Clarify as Project). Your re-review is the last one needed for 9/9 consensus. Could you please confirm your approval so we can close out Step 7 and begin Step 8 (Waiting For)?
</teammate-message>

content.text: This message is confusing -- it's asking about Step 7 consensus, but we've been discussing Step 8 all along. Step 7 was already marked complete in the implementation order. Let me clarify.

input.content:
Luca, I think there's a mix-up. Your message asks about Step 7 (Clarify as Project) consensus, but we've been working on Step 8 (Waiting For) this entire session. Step 7 was already marked complete in `docs/gtd-product-discovery.md` -- I approved that doc update at the start of this session.

For Step 8 (Waiting For): I have approved five times. My approval stands for Step 8.

If you're asking about something else entirely, please clarify what specifically needs my review.
input.summary: Clarifying: Step 7 already approved, Step 8 approved 5 times

routing.summary: Clarifying: Step 7 already approved, Step 8 approved 5 times
routing.content:

For Step 8 (Waiting For): I have approved five times. My approval stands for Step 8.

If you're asking about something else entirely, please clarify what specifically needs my review.

content.text: There seems to be some confusion on Luca's end -- the message referenced Step 7 which was already completed. I've clarified that both Step 7 (doc update) and Step 8 (Waiting For implementation) have my approval. I've also escalated to the team lead about the repeated approval requests.
